subject: Quick tax/bookkeeping check for 2026
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I help high-income earners and business owners reduce tax drag and tighten bookkeeping so decisions are cleaner year-round.

subject: 3 common misses I see at $100k+ income
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Three common gaps I see:
1) Income structure not optimized
2) Deductions not planned early enough
3) Bookkeeping too delayed to be useful

If helpful, I can walk through your setup and show where savings/opportunities may exist.
https://calendly.com/cromine-rhw/30-min-zoom

– Chea
